title: Mana the Girlfriend of Steel What do you think of her
display_title: Mana the Girlfriend of Steel What do you think of her
wikitext:
[]: Mana: the Girlfriend of Steel - What do you think of her?             Quote Post by Conrad Gray » Thu Oct 26, 2006 7:49 pm The eponymous heroine from the Eva game- do you like her or hate her? I think she's okay, in an alternate-universe sort of way. At least it gives Shinji the rare opportunity to actually act like he has a spine, or at least some social skills with girls. And Mana is certainly more normal than the other two female pilots. Unless you consider Hikari, heh. Side- I don't know why, but I guess polls aren't allowed on this subforum. So the responses are either Eh (positive), Meh (indifferent), and Bleah (negative).

[]:             Quote Post by MaggotMaster » Thu Oct 26, 2006 8:24 pm Too Mary Sue-ish for Evangelion.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Oct 26, 2006 8:37 pm I don't know much about her. All I know is that Shinji isn't good enough for her.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Oct 26, 2006 11:20 pm Mana is a tramp, and I could mathematically prove that she is evil if I had advanced mathematical skills.

[]:             Quote Post by Conrad Gray » Fri Oct 27, 2006 12:22 am Were any other TRIDENT (or whatever) pilots mentioned in that game?

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Fri Oct 27, 2006 12:23 am Conrad Gray wrote: Were any other TRIDENT (or whatever) pilots mentioned in that game?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Oct 27, 2006 12:49 am Keita (the kid who crashed his landcruiser) and Musashi (the pilot of the spokes-Trident).

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Fri Oct 27, 2006 12:51 am I've got GoS, but haven't been able to finish it. Do they ever give a reason for NERV's rivals using child pilots? Since, as far as I can recall, the T-RIDEN-T doesn't contain anybody's soul and isn't organic, what's the point of having kids drive the big clunkers?

[]:             Quote Post by Conrad Gray » Fri Oct 27, 2006 1:07 am Even NGE has to conform to standard anime archetypes.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Oct 27, 2006 4:09 am Reichu wrote: Mana is a tramp, and I could mathematically prove that she is evil if I had advanced mathematical skills.

[]:             Quote Post by Kaysow » Fri Oct 27, 2006 8:45 am BobBQ wrote: Do they ever give a reason for NERV's rivals using child pilots? Since, as far as I can recall, the T-RIDEN-T doesn't contain anybody's soul and isn't organic, what's the point of having kids drive the big clunkers?

[]:             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Fri Oct 27, 2006 9:23 am Mr. Tines wrote: Reichu wrote: Mana is a tramp, and I could mathematically prove that she is evil if I had advanced mathematical skills.

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Fri Oct 27, 2006 1:54 pm The first time I saw her I said "WOW Asuka cut her hair" now Im like "Hey its that girl that no one likes"

[]:             Quote Post by jcmoorehead » Fri Oct 27, 2006 2:07 pm I don't particularly hate her but i'm not a fan of her. She just seems to be nothing more then a plot device for the game she isn't very interesting and just seems to have a generic personality really. Then again it's not really the most exciting of games either. I only played it for the Asuka ending.

[]:             Quote Post by master0rolando » Sat Oct 28, 2006 3:26 am so many haytas i love Mana... ive always liked characters like her... plus her hair and demeanor remind me of a sweet girl i had love with at a summer camp in Montanna one year im curious to know what Anno thinks of her...

[]:             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Sat Oct 28, 2006 7:34 am That's she is the anti-Eva probably. She just doesn't fit into the world of Evangelion.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Oct 30, 2006 8:39 pm I thought she was a cute character (kinda cool how Megumi Hayashibara gets a chance to do a hyper character for a series game, and not just Rei!), but I prefer Asuka/Shinji. (Yes, I beat the game and watched all three endings. My next target: GoS2! ...raw ) Asuka appears to Shinji and Mana afterclass: "Anyone will do for you as long as it's a girl, right?!" Shinji freaks out: "Wha...what's wrong, Asuka? Do you need something?" Hehe...poor sap. He can never get a break. Though there was a very OOC Asuka quote from ending 3, I think it was: "You can't see that girl because you're in love with me!" :shock: (As Shinji replied "I don't know about that!" ) Anyhow, I thought it was interesting how with, um, ending 2 I guess it was, Mana flashes Shinji. (She took a shower at Misato's place.) Wonder if that means anything "happened"? BTW, I love that "money/girls are the root of all evil" post, funny stuff! :mrgreen:

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Mon Oct 30, 2006 9:06 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Anyhow, I thought it was interesting how with, um, ending 2 I guess it was, Mana flashes Shinji. (She took a shower at Misato's place.) Wonder if that means anything "happened"?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Oct 30, 2006 9:15 pm *cracks up* Yes, that's the one. ^^;

[]:             Quote Post by MaggotMaster » Mon Oct 30, 2006 10:43 pm Ornette wrote:
